entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum, a legume crop from which disease resistance genes were cloned

entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan, a legume crop from which disease resistance genes were cloned

entities.name: DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist disease, conferred by specific nucleotide binding sites

entities.name: NUCLEOTIDE BINDING SITES
entities.description: Genetic sequences that confer disease resistance and were cloned from chickpea and pigeon pea

entities.name: CLONING
entities.description: The process used to isolate putative disease resistance gene clones

entities.name: N GENE
entities.description: A resistance gene from tobacco showing high homology to the cloned candidates

entities.name: TOBACCO
entities.description: The source plant for the N resistance gene

entities.name: L6 GENE
entities.description: A resistance gene from flax showing high homology to the cloned candidates

entities.name: FLAX
entities.description: The source plant for the L6 resistance gene
